subtitle: The Gulf Coast beach whose 99% quartz sand stays cool underfoot, named America's #1 beach by Dr. Beach in 2011 and 2017.
spike_statement: Siesta Beach's sand is 99% quartz washed down from the Appalachians, ground so fine it reflects heat and stays cool to walk on at noon.

levers.photo_tone: bright Gulf daylight, white sand, low surf
